debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hm : @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f
he : @CategoryInContext.Category.split_epi α C X Y f
⊢ IsIso f

proof:
obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hfg : f ≫ g = Category.id X := hg
  have h_inv : g ≫ f = Category.id Y := by
    have hgfg : (g ≫ f) ≫ g = g := by
      rw [Category.assoc, hfg, Category.comp_id]
    have := @Category.mono_op_epi α C Y X g
    contrapose! this
    refine Or.inr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · intro h_mono_g
      have := h_mono_g (g ≫ f) (id Y)
        (hgfg.trans (by rw [Category.id_comp]))
      aesop
    · intro Z h k h_eq
      have := @Category.mono_op_epi α C Y X g
      exact this.mp
        (@section_mono α C X Y g f
          (hm (f ≫ g) (id X) (congrFun (congrArg comp hg) f))) _ _ h_eq
  exact ⟨g, hfg, h_inv⟩
successful_attempts:
obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hfg : f ≫ g = Category.id X := hg
  have h_inv : g ≫ f = Category.id Y := by
    have hgfg : (g ≫ f) ≫ g = g := by
      rw [Category.assoc, hfg, Category.comp_id]
    have := @Category.mono_op_epi α C Y X g
    contrapose! this
    refine Or.inr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · intro h_mono_g
      have := h_mono_g (g ≫ f) (id Y)
        (hgfg.trans (by rw [Category.id_comp]))
      aesop
    · intro Z h k h_eq
      have := @Category.mono_op_epi α C Y X g
      exact this.mp
        (@section_mono α C X Y g f
          (hm (f ≫ g) (id X) (congrFun (congrArg comp hg) f))) _ _ h_eq
  exact ⟨g, hfg, h_inv⟩
